ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stall_no" INTEGER /* Stall number where the product is located */,
  "instock_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to stock */,
  "market_category" INTEGER /* Reference to the market category the product belongs to */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Fashion, Child_care) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the product (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Demand for the product */,
  "discount_avail" INTEGER /* Whether discount is available for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_market_category FOREIGN KEY ("market_category") REFERENCES market_categories ("market_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category FOREIGN KEY ("product_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_categories" (
  "market_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market category */,
  "market_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the market category */,
  "market_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the market category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "product_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "loyalty_customer" TEXT /* Whether the customer is a loyalty customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being priced */,
  "minimum_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the product */,
  "maximum_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the product */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "price_effective_date" TEXT /* Date and time the price becomes effective */,
  "price_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being charged */,
  "charges_1" INTEGER /* First charge amount */,
  "charges_2" REAL /* Second charge percentage */,
  "charge_type" TEXT /* Type of charge (e.g., shipping, tax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales rep) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_data" (
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the CRM data */,
  "crm_data" TEXT /* CRM data from external source */,
  "crm_source" TEXT /* Source of the CRM data (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "erp_data" (
  "erp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ERP entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product associated with the ERP data */,
  "erp_data" TEXT /* ERP data from external source */,
  "erp_source" TEXT /* Source of the ERP data (e.g., SAP, Oracle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("erp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_erp_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
